raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track curves gently left ahead with car slightly left of center; waypoint delta is +6.25° indicating a small left correction needed, applying 5° left steering at 1.5 speed.
knowledge: Track has a left-curving section around waypoints 55-75, heading southwest then west
Car is consistently near center and well within safe margin throughout this section
Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves
Use steering_angle=0 for |delta| <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections
Delta near +5-10° means gentle left correction — use steering_angle=+5
Delta near +10-15° means moderate left correction — use steering_angle=+10
Delta near +15-25° means stronger left correction — use steering_angle=+15
Car is maintaining 1.5 speed well through this left-curving section
Waypoints 70-75 show continuing gentle left curve (southwest direction)
When delta drops below 5°, immediately switch to 0 steering to prevent oscillation
